prompt: Create an ultra-realistic editorial fashion photograph in vertical 3:4 orientation, shot at golden hour on the Hatirjheel lakeside promenade in Dhaka, Bangladesh. The scene contains exactly one person: a beautiful young South Asian woman in her early 20s, full-body view, standing beside a decorative black metal waterfront railing with one hand resting lightly on the rail, relaxed posture, looking to her left with a calm confident expression. She has long straight dark brown hair parted in the middle, natural makeup, and warm rim light on her face and hair. Outfit: exactly four main visible clothing/accessory items — a fitted ribbed cream beige long-sleeve knit top tucked into high-waisted black wide-leg trousers, black pointed flats, and a black wristwatch. Background: Hatirjheel water glowing with sunset reflections on the left, one large white arched bridge softly blurred in the distance, one vintage black streetlamp behind her, one black rectangular sign on a pole to the right displaying হাতিরঝিল, ঢাকা in white Bengali lettering, and a row of palm trees along the promenade with about five visible trunks receding into the background. Use shallow depth of field, 50mm editorial portrait look, realistic skin texture, natural proportions, warm cinematic color grading, soft haze, and high-end fashion magazine composition. Keep the model as the only person in the image; no men, no other women, no crowds, no tourists, no photographers, and no vehicles in the foreground.

promptZh: 创作一张超写实的编辑风格时尚摄影作品，采用 3:4 竖构图，拍摄于孟加拉国达卡 Hatirjheel 湖滨步道的黄金时刻。场景中仅包含一人：一位美丽的年轻 南亚 女性，20 岁出头，全身照，站在装饰性的黑色金属滨水栏杆旁，一只手轻轻搭在栏杆上，姿态放松，向左侧看，表情平静而自信。她留着 中分长直深棕色头发，妆容自然，脸部和头发上有温暖的轮廓光。服装：明确包含四件主要的可见衣物/配饰 — 一件修身罗纹 米色 长袖针织衫，束进高腰黑色阔腿裤中，搭配黑色尖头平底鞋和一块黑色腕表。背景：左侧是映照着夕阳余晖的 Hatirjheel 湖水，远处有一座柔焦处理的大型白色拱桥，她身后有一盏复古黑色路灯，右侧立柱上有一块黑色长方形标牌，上面用白色孟加拉语显示着 হাতিরঝিল, ঢাকা，步道旁有一排棕榈树，约五棵树干向背景延伸。使用浅景深，50mm 编辑人像风格，真实的皮肤纹理，自然的比例，温暖的电影级调色，柔和的雾气，以及高端时尚杂志的构图。保持模特为画面中唯一的人；前景中不得出现男性、其他女性、人群、游客、摄影师或车辆。
